caption: In the rain‑slick neon‑lit bar of the futuristic marketplace, cyberpunk heroine Lyra blazes a path through the city, her sleek, low‑cut armor‑tunic framing her curvaceous figure, a glowing halo of light around her chest and hips. With a grin and a wink ⚡, she pulls a crowd into her orbit while neon signs flicker in the background. #cyberpunk #futurism #streetfashion #digitalart #neonaesthetics
